author: Ram Kishen, Hakim
title: Ghar da Nirbah jan Ghar da Singar
gloss: A treatise on house-keeping, nursing, hygiene, &c.
notes: Domestic-science manual (housekeeping/nursing/hygiene) — the domestic-economy genre in Punjabi.

title: 'Sikh Parivar Sahaik Deg' arthat 'Sikh Family Relief Fund,' Head Office Gujranwala.—'Vidya Sahaik Fund' de Sankhep ate Sadhran Samachar
gloss: Prospectus of the Education Fund started for the exclusive benefit of the Sikhs.
publisher: Bhai Teja Singh, Honorary Secretary, Sikh Parivar Sahaik Deg, Gujránwála
notes: Companion to p9 s1 (marriage fund) — now the Sikh-only education fund prospectus; the Sikh Parivar Sahaik Deg building communal welfare infrastructure across marriage/education.

title: Sukdai Kirnar
gloss: A price list of medicines prepared at the Gobind Aushudhalaya, Lahore.
copyright: The Manager, Gobind Aushadhalaya, Lahore; No. 6, dated the 4th March, 1910.
notes: Second Gobind Aushudhalaya price-list this quarter (cf. p9 s2, Danke di Chot) — the pharmacy registering multiple copyrighted catalogs, 4,000 copies.

author: Neshwar Sharma
title: Paheli, Hissa Awwal
gloss: A booklet on Punjabi riddles, with their solutions, Part I.
notes: Punjabi riddle collection in Persian script — serial 10 continues Punjabi—Miscellaneous across the script subsection.

author: Achhar Singh, Bhai
title: Qissa Kaljug Bartant wa Bhunchal da hal
gloss: A description of the evils pertaining to Kaliyuga or the Iron Age. The author ascribes the terrible earthquakes of the near past to the evil deeds of the present generation.
notes: Earthquakes (likely the 1905 Kangra quake) read as Kaliyuga's moral punishment; sepoy author (14th Sikhs, same as p8 s3).

title: Adhuri Vidada Jind da Khau, Tract No. 360
gloss: A poem showing how an educated but irreligious girl, lost her son, husband and everything she had.
notes: Khalsa Tract Society verse tract (No. 360) warning that secular education without religion ruins women.

author: Amar Singh, Bhai
title: Tiwin Prakash
gloss: Verses on the wiles of women.
